user.title: DMI Weather EDR
user.description:
Set up your DMI Weather EDR integration. Data is provided by the DMI Open Data API (no API key required).

Latitude and longitude are pre-filled from your Home Assistant system location. Change them if you want weather for a different location.

data_description.latitude: Default from Home Assistant system settings
data_description.longitude: Default from Home Assistant system settings
data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data from DMI (minimum 5, default 30)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DMI EDR API
